remarks: Welcome to this beautifully updated first-floor apartment in the heart of Greenwich. Offering 2 spacious bedrooms with generous closet space and a large full bath, this charming home blends comfort, convenience, and style.  The bright, open-concept living and dining area flows into an updated kitchen featuring a dishwasher and a walk-in pantry, creating an inviting space for both everyday living and entertaining. Freshly painted with new flooring throughout, this move-in-ready home also offers in-unit convenience with access to a private washer and dryer in the basement, along with a dedicated storage room.  Step outside to enjoy the beautifully finished bluestone patio and shared backyard-perfect for relaxing or enjoying the outdoors. Private off-street parking is included.  Ideally located just minutes from Greenwich Avenue, Metro-North, parks, beaches, restaurants, and shopping, this home offers the best of Greenwich living with easy access to everything the town has to offer.  Rent includes landscaping, snow removal, trash service, and water. Tenant is responsible for separately metered utilities. Available immediately. No pets.
